RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0023 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Ivan Park Date of Birth: 11/12/1971 SSN (tokenized): TKN-370839 Annual Income: $108,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $12,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Dublin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN97480AL Toyota Civic 2019 EV CPO 28,000 Authorized Signature: Ivan Park
